title: Device Home Screen - Bluetooth turned off
scenario: Device home screen correctly updates headset connection status when Bluetooth is toggled off and back on
steps: 1. Pair and connect a Poly Bluetooth headset to the mobile device.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Verify the headset appears as connected on the Home screen.
4. Turn off Bluetooth from the mobile device's system settings.
5. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Observe the device list on the Home screen.
7. Turn Bluetooth back on from the mobile device's system settings.
8. Reconnect the headset from the mobile device's Bluetooth settings.
9. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
10. Observe the device list on the Home screen.
expected: Step 6: The headset is shown as disconnected in the device list on the Home screen. Step 10: The headset is shown as connected in the device list on the Home screen.
